title: commiphora eminii subsp. zimmermannii
intro: Commiphora eminii subsp. zimmermannii, also known as African myrrh, is a plant species belonging to the Burseraceae family. It is a shrub-like tree native to East Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of African myrrh include relieving pain and inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and supporting respiratory health. African myrrh is often used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and topical creams, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
